items.title: Caitlin Clark finds alignment — and delivers a record-breaking performance in Fever win
items.body_excerpt: Caitlin Clark after tallying 45 points and 10 assists in a win over the Storm on Friday. (Photo: ION) It’s the slowest sports week of the year, and Caitlin Clark is once again giving sports fans something to talk about. Earlier in the week, ESPN held its annual ESPY Awards in…
